name: AIRecon Recon Playbook
description: AIRecon-specific recon methodology, phase tactics, and agent directives — curated and optimized for the AIRecon RECON pipeline phase.
sample_queries: What is the correct order of phases in an AIRecon penetration test?
How should an AIRecon agent begin reconnaissance on a new target URL?
What tools should be used for passive subdomain enumeration?
How to approach reconnaissance when WAF is detected?
What are the agent directives for the RECON phase?
notes: First-party AIRecon dataset. Pairs with network-recon for full RECON phase coverage. Covers phase transitions, agent loop behavior, and tool selection strategy.
